## Persona checklist

<!-- Delete this section if you didn't touch any persona files. -->

- [ ] Frontmatter validates — `make test` runs the persona lint
- [ ] Relationships are bidirectional — every resident this persona references
      also references them back
- [ ] The voice is distinct — read the idle thoughts next to their closest
      neighbor's; if you could swap the names, keep writing
- [ ] Fictional composite, no real private individual, written with empathy
      (see `RESPONSIBLE_USE.md` and the Code of Conduct)
